title: Vasudha
subTitle: After Santosh strikes Sarika, Vasudha makes things worse by dropping taunts. Consequently, an indignant Sarika takes revenge by exposing Vasudha to Santosh.

title: Jagadhatri
subTitle: Unbeknownst to her family, a young woman leads a double life as an undercover intelligence officer, determined to clear her mother's name.

title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
subTitle: After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.
